name: codex-session-insights
description: Generate ephemeral operational dashboards from recent Codex sessions and memory context.

interface.shortDescription: Ephemeral reports from recent Codex work
interface.longDescription: Analyze recent Codex sessions and optional memory summaries to surface project areas, workflow patterns, friction signals, practical improvements, instruction updates, and ready-to-use prompt patterns.
defaultPrompt: Generate an ephemeral Codex session insights report
Show friction points from the last 30 days
